calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-07-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eli Coffino-Greenberg for (executor) Theresa Flandrich.

The Court stated that there are two issues which are the extraordinary fees being requested by the personal representative and the attorney and asked if counsel had anything to add. Mr. Greenberg stated that they filed a supplement after reading the examiner's notes and that they had nothing to add. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-16-2016 Continued To Aug-29-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-18-2015 Granted Per Written Order
